query: SELECT p.id, p.colaboradorId, u.name FROM pdis p JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Usuarioteste%' LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT p.id, p.colaboradorId, u.name FROM pdis p JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Usuarioteste%' LIMIT 3;
